violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC is in process of taking class. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with orange and red biolfilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024
Bottle of bleach was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with a orange biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean on shelving in front area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the front-end prep area, refrigeration shelving, shelving throughout back kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024
The ceiling above ware washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
